---
title: "ShareBridge"
description: "Portable Shiny app deployment for restricted Windows environments"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <h1>ShareBridge</h1>
  <p class="lead">
    Package and distribute Shiny apps to Windows users who have no admin rights,
    no R installation, and no Shiny Server — just a SharePoint sync.
  </p>
  <a class="btn-hero" href="getting-started.html">Get Started</a>
  <a class="btn-hero btn-hero-outline" href="https://github.com/PrigasG/ShareBridge">View on GitHub</a>
</div>
```

<br>

## What is ShareBridge?

ShareBridge is a local deployment framework for packaging Shiny apps into a single self-contained folder that end users can run by double-clicking a file. It is designed for teams that work inside restricted Windows environments where:

- Users do not have admin rights
- Installing R or RStudio on every machine is impractical
- Shiny Server or Posit Connect is not available
- Distribution happens through SharePoint or OneDrive

ShareBridge handles everything: bundling your app code, detecting and installing all package dependencies, copying a stripped portable R, and generating a clean launcher that opens the app in a friendly browser URL like `http://sharebridge-myapp.localhost:3670`.

---

## Core workflow

```{=html}
<div class="workflow">
  <div class="workflow-step">
    <strong>Publisher</strong>
    <span>Opens Publisher UI</span>
  </div>
  <div class="workflow-arrow">→</div>
  <div class="workflow-step">
    <strong>Build</strong>
    <span>Packages app + R + deps</span>
  </div>
  <div class="workflow-arrow">→</div>
  <div class="workflow-step">
    <strong>SharePoint</strong>
    <span>Copies output folder</span>
  </div>
  <div class="workflow-arrow">→</div>
  <div class="workflow-step">
    <strong>Sync</strong>
    <span>User syncs locally</span>
  </div>
  <div class="workflow-arrow">→</div>
  <div class="workflow-step">
    <strong>Launch</strong>
    <span>Double-click LaunchApp</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Features

```{=html}
<div class="feature-grid">

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">📦</span>
    <h3>Zero admin rights required</h3>
    <p>Bundles R and all packages inside the deployment folder. Users need nothing pre-installed.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">🖥️</span>
    <h3>Visual Publisher UI</h3>
    <p>A Shiny-based publisher interface with live build progress, package detection, and saved profiles.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">🔍</span>
    <h3>Automatic dependency detection</h3>
    <p>Scans your app code for <code>library()</code>, <code>require()</code>, and <code>pkg::</code> calls. Falls back to regex if renv is not available.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">📡</span>
    <h3>SharePoint & OneDrive distribution</h3>
    <p>Place the output folder in SharePoint. Users sync it and double-click <code>LaunchApp.hta</code> — nothing else to do.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">🌐</span>
    <h3>Friendly local URLs</h3>
    <p>Apps open at a human-readable address like <code>sharebridge-myapp.localhost:3670</code> instead of a raw port number.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">📴</span>
    <h3>Offline repo support</h3>
    <p>Optionally build a local CRAN mirror inside the deployment so packages install without internet access.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">🔬</span>
    <h3>Health check & test launch</h3>
    <p>After every build, ShareBridge checks that all required files and packages are present, then lets you test-launch with one click.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-card">
    <span class="icon">💾</span>
    <h3>Build profiles</h3>
    <p>Save your publisher settings as named profiles. Reload them in one click for repeatable builds across versions.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```

---

## Requirements

| Side | Requirement |
|---|---|
| **Publisher machine** | Windows, R ≥ 4.0, packages: `shiny`, `processx`, `jsonlite` |
| **End user machine** | Windows, SharePoint/OneDrive sync (no R, no admin rights needed when portable R is bundled) |

---

## Quick install

ShareBridge is not a CRAN package — it is a framework folder. To get started:

1. Clone or download the repository
2. Open `PublishApp.hta` to launch the Publisher UI
3. Point it at your Shiny app and click **Build deployment**

See the [Getting Started](getting-started.html) guide for the full walkthrough.
